description: Every placeholder used in this template. The init script reads this file, prompts for each, validates, and runs a single find-and-replace pass across every tracked text file.

placeholders.name: PROJECT_NAME
placeholders.prompt: Project name (human-readable, e.g. 'Acme Corp Portal')

placeholders.name: PROJECT_SLUG
placeholders.prompt: Project slug (kebab-case ASCII, used in paths and URLs)

placeholders.name: PROJECT_DESCRIPTION
placeholders.prompt: Project description (one paragraph, 1-3 sentences)
placeholders.default: a new engagement scaffolded from project-blueprint-template

placeholders.name: CLIENT_NAME
placeholders.prompt: Client name (organization)

placeholders.name: CLIENT_SLUG
placeholders.prompt: Client slug (kebab-case ASCII)

placeholders.name: CLIENT_DOMAIN
placeholders.prompt: Client's primary domain (for custom-domain dashboards, e.g. 'acmecorp.com')

placeholders.name: PROJECT_TYPE
placeholders.prompt: Project type (one of: software, branding, website, ai-implementation)

placeholders.name: START_DATE
placeholders.prompt: Start date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)

placeholders.name: END_DATE
placeholders.prompt: End date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD or 'TBD')

placeholders.name: PROJECT_LEAD
placeholders.prompt: Project lead full name

placeholders.name: PROJECT_LEAD_GH
placeholders.prompt: Project lead GitHub handle (without @)

placeholders.name: PROJECT_LEAD_EMAIL
placeholders.prompt: Project lead email

placeholders.name: TEMPLATE_OWNER
placeholders.prompt: GitHub org/user that owns the template repo (e.g. newmindsgroup)

placeholders.name: REPO_URL
placeholders.prompt: Full URL to this project's Git repo (https://github.com/owner/repo)

placeholders.name: DEPLOY_HOSTING
placeholders.prompt: Hosting target for the dashboard (one of: vercel, vultr, none)

placeholders.name: VERCEL_PROJECT_NAME
placeholders.prompt: Vercel project name (used if hosting=vercel; convention is {{CLIENT_SLUG}}-blueprint)

placeholders.name: DASHBOARD_URL
placeholders.prompt: Public URL where the live Blueprint Dashboard will be published

placeholders.name: INTERNAL_AUTH_METHOD
placeholders.prompt: How internal/admin sections are gated (one of: cosmetic, basic-auth, oauth, sso, none)

placeholders.name: ADMIN_TOKEN
placeholders.prompt: Admin escalation token for cosmetic gating (random string, used as ?admin=TOKEN)

placeholders.name: DRIVE_FOLDER_NAME
placeholders.prompt: Display name of the Drive folder (with spaces and accents allowed)

placeholders.name: LANGUAGE_PRIMARY
placeholders.prompt: Primary working language (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'pt')

placeholders.name: LANGUAGE_SECONDARY
placeholders.prompt: Secondary working language (or repeat the primary if monolingual)

placeholders.name: COPYRIGHT_YEAR
placeholders.prompt: Copyright year

placeholders.name: COPYRIGHT_HOLDER
placeholders.prompt: Copyright holder (your org or your name)

placeholders.name: INIT_TOOL
placeholders.prompt: Tool you ran init.sh from (e.g. 'Cowork', 'Cursor', 'terminal')

notes: Placeholders inside the project-memory templates that are NOT in this list (e.g. {{GOAL_1}}, {{IN_PROGRESS_ITEM_1}}, {{BACKEND_OWNER_GH}}, {{STAKEHOLDER_1_NAME}}, {{RISK_1_TITLE}}, etc.) are intentionally left for the user to fill in by hand after init. They are listed in .template/post-init-checklist.md.
Placeholders are matched literally as `{{NAME}}` (with double braces). Avoid using `{{...}}` in any text that is NOT a placeholder.
ADMIN_TOKEN, if left blank during init, can be generated post-init with: openssl rand -hex 12. Treat it as cosmetic; do not rely on it for confidentiality.
